data.title: Ethereum-based privacy project RAILGUN blocked 328 privacy token transactions in a single day, setting a new record.
data.description: Etherscan officially announced on its X platform that the usage of RAILGUN, an Ethereum ecosystem privacy project, continues to climb. On-chain data shows a recent upward trend in daily transactions of privacy-blocked tokens, reaching a record high of 328 transactions in a single day. Privacy applications are becoming increasingly prevalent on Ethereum. Users can enable privacy-blocking transactions by selecting "Additional Filters" at http://etherscan.io/advanced-filter. With token privacy mode enabled, users can conduct private transfers and interact with DeFi without exposing their on-chain activities.

data.title: India's Financial Intelligence Agency Urges Halt on Privacy Token Transactions
data.description: India's financial intelligence agency has instructed domestic cryptocurrency exchanges to cease offering transactions involving privacy tokens. According to Foresight News, these tokens are now considered 'unacceptable assets' under a risk mitigation framework, prohibiting deposits and withdrawals related to them.

data.title: How Japan’s Interest Rate Decision Could Shape Bitcoin’s Next Major Move
data.description:
Bitcoin is entering one of its most sensitive macro-driven weeks in recent months as Japan prepares to announce its interest rate decision on January 23.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-japans-interest-rate-decision-could-shape-bitcoins-next-major-move/

data.title: Why Buying Cardano (ADA) Here Could Mean Weeks Of Dead Money
data.description:
Cardano’s (ADA) current price may look tempting, especially as it sits deep in oversold territory, but cheap doesn’t always mean opportunity. When momentum is absent and structure remains weak, early buyers often find themselves stuck watching price drift sideways for weeks. For ADA, the real question isn’t how low it has gone; it’s whether it has the strength to escape. Trapped In the Red Zone: Pressure, Not Opportunity Trend Rider, in a recent update shared on X, explained that ADA’s daily chart has been flashing signals that many traders interpret as a “perfect bottom
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/buying-cardano-is-dead-money/

data.title: The dollar is on track for its biggest weekly drop since June of last year.
data.description: The US dollar index (DXY) is likely to fall by as much as 1% this week, its biggest weekly drop since June 2025, after Trump's Greenland threat and sudden reversal unsettled investors. Thierry Wizman, global foreign exchange and interest rate strategist at Macquarie Group, said, "While the Greenland agreement addressed the immediate issues of tariffs and invasion, it did not resolve the core issues that seem to be driving allies apart." (Jinshi)

data.title: India has banned the trading of privacy tokens, citing money laundering risks.
data.description: According to The Economic Times, India's Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU), under the Ministry of Finance, has ordered domestic cryptocurrency exchanges and platforms to cease offering Anonymity Enhancement Tokens (ACEs), prohibiting deposits and withdrawals of these tokens, and classifying them as "unacceptable assets" under a risk mitigation framework. The FIU also warned that mixing tokens using tools like "tumblers" and "mixers," as well as transferring funds to self-custodial wallets, could allow funds from sanctioned or blacklisted addresses to enter the system, making them difficult to trace. Platforms are required to collect data related to non-custodial wallets and assess whether to set limits on such transfers.

data.title: Anthropic Releases Updated Claude Constitution with Open License
data.description:
AI model company Anthropic has recently unveiled the updated version of its 'Claude Constitution,' which is now available under the Creative Commons CC0 1.0 license. According to PANews, this document serves as the 'highest authority' for training purposes, aimed at generating synthetic training data and ranking feedback. The constitution has shifted from listing principles to explaining the reasoning behind them, enhancing its ability to generalize to new situations.

The document prioritizes broad safety, ethics, guideline adherence, and sincere assistance, outlining 'hard constraints' such as not providing substantial help for biological weapons. It also includes sections on virtues, psychological safety, and model self-awareness, emphasizing transparency and continuous iteration.

data.description:

data.title: Dogecoin Moves Closer to Wall Street as 21Shares Launches Spot ETF on Nasdaq
data.description:
"Dogecoin is taking significant steps towards becoming more integrated into mainstream finance, particularly as Wall Street shows increasing interest in cryptocurrency. This development comes alongside the announcement that 21Shares has launched a spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) dedicated to Dogecoin on the Nasdaq stock exchange, marking a pivotal moment for both the cryptocurrency and traditional financial markets."
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-moves-closer-to-wall-street-as-21shares-launches-spot-etf-on-nasdaq/

data.title: Winter Storm Threatens Bitcoin Mining Operations in Southern U.S.
data.description: A winter storm posing a threat to much of the southern United States may lead to a halt in Bitcoin mining operations. According to ChainCatcher, AccuWeather reported on Thursday that the 'massive winter storm' could stretch across 1,800 miles, from the far western edge of Texas to the mid-Atlantic coast, affecting over 60 million people. Historically, Bitcoin miners have voluntarily reduced activity during major storms to alleviate pressure on the power grid. During a significant winter storm in Texas in 2022, cryptocurrency miners in the state voluntarily scaled back operations. Bitcoin environmental, social, and governance researcher Daniel Batten noted that as extreme weather events become more common globally, the need for load balancing in Bitcoin mining will increase, especially with more solar and wind energy being integrated into the grid.

data.title: Bitget now supports trading in the BitGo (BTGO) stock token.
data.description: Bitget now supports trading in the BitGo (BTGO) stock token. Users who upgrade to the latest version of the Bitget App can trade in the "Stocks" section, supporting limit orders, market orders, and tools such as preset stop-loss orders to assist in trading decisions. Furthermore, Bitget's "US Stock Carnival Month" event continues, offering 0% transaction fees for all stock token trading for a limited time. For more details, please refer to the official Bitget platform.

data.title: Ledger plans a US IPO, with a potential valuation exceeding $4 billion.
data.description: Crypto hardware wallet company Ledger is preparing for an IPO in the United States, with a potential valuation exceeding $4 billion, possibly as early as this year. (FT)

data.title: Stablecoins Will Become the Default Money for Billions of AI Agents: Circle CEO
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin miners brace for massive ice storm barreling towards southern US
data.description:
Bitcoin miners have powered down to ease the load on the grid in the past, such as in 2022 when Texas miners curtailed their activities amid a major winter storm.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-miners-prepare-ice-storm-southern-us?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
